ie.isde.metadata

Interface IDataset

  • All Known Implementing Classes:
    Dataset

    public interface IDataset
    Represents the metadata object describing a dataset in the Irish Spatial Data Exchange
    Author:
    Adam Leadbetter

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      String baseUri()
      Returns the base URI for the dataset, particularly useful when building Linked Data representations of the dataset's metadata
      String dateIssued() 
      String fileIdentifier()
      Return the file identifier extracted from the metadata record as a String, or null if not initialised.
      void fromISO(String isoLocator)
      Populates an object's attributes from an ISO XML record
      String identifierToFileName()
      Returns the identifier of the record as a file system safe string for saving the record to disk, minus the file extension
      String metadataAbstract()
      Get the abstract (describing the who, what, when, where and why) of the dataset
      String title()
      Returns the title of the dataset represented by the metadata object

    • Method Detail

      • fromISO

        void fromISO(String isoLocator)
      throws IOException,
             ParserConfigurationException,
             SAXException,
             XPathException
        Populates an object's attributes from an ISO XML record
        Parameters:
        isoLocator - String The file path or URI of an ISO XML metadata record conforming to the Irish Spatial Data Infrastructure profile.
        Throws:
        IOException
        ParserConfigurationException
        SAXException
        XPathException

      • metadataAbstract

        String metadataAbstract()
        Get the abstract (describing the who, what, when, where and why) of the dataset
        Returns:
        The abstract for the dataset

      • baseUri

        String baseUri()
        Returns the base URI for the dataset, particularly useful when building Linked Data representations of the dataset's metadata
        Returns:
        The base URI for the dataset

      • title

        String title()
        Returns the title of the dataset represented by the metadata object
        Returns:
        The title of the dataset

      • identifierToFileName

        String identifierToFileName()
        Returns the identifier of the record as a file system safe string for saving the record to disk, minus the file extension
        Returns:
        A file system safe name for saving the dataset metadata record

      • fileIdentifier

        String fileIdentifier()
        Return the file identifier extracted from the metadata record as a String, or null if not initialised.
        Returns:
        The file identifier as a String

      • dateIssued

        String dateIssued()
